_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Make recommendations based on test results.
reference_document_element_description: Design and analyze controlled experiments (A/B tests), including hypothesis specification, randomization oversight, results interpretation, and recommendation delivery.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-005 (RM, cosine: 0.380), DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.377).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.539). Shared vocabulary: [results]. DCWF-only terms [based, make, recommendations, test] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyze, b, controlled, delivery, design, experiments] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.893, R=0.835). P exceeds R by 0.059 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Make recommendations based on test results." and "Design and analyze controlled experiments (A/B tests), including hypothesis spec" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.543 ≈ STS 0.539 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [results] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [results]. DCWF-only: [based, make, recommendations, test]. WIDAI-only: [analyze, b, controlled, delivery, design, experiments].
